summary: Excellent soundboard capture of the early‑68 Carousel show, delivering a stunning performance highlighted by Jerry’s captivating guitar and a heartfelt second‑set dedication to Neal Cassady.
review: The recording is praised for its clear, improved audio (noted as an upgrade over previous releases) and the official release is considered worth buying. Reviewers describe the concert as historic and “stunning,” especially noting Jerry Garcia’s mesmerizing playing and the emotional second‑set dedicated to Neal Cassady.

ai_rating.rationale: Three enthusiastic 5‑star reviews commend both the musical performance and audio quality, while a single low rating relates only to access issues, not content quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific complaints; reviewers cite an improvement over earlier releases and describe the sound as crisp and well‑balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set was dedicated to Neal Cassady, marking a historic moment with several first performances; overall flow described as stunning from start to finish.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His playing left a strong impression – reviewers called it "wow fucking cool" and highlighted his captivating stage presence.
